name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: 4205 E Truman Rd, Kansas City, MO — Cash America Pawn buys, sells, and loans against jewelry, electronics, and collectibles.
description_long:
Cash America Pawn at 4205 E Truman Rd is a standalone pawn shop in Kansas City, MO, offering quick cash loans and merchandise sales. The location is open Monday through Friday 9 AM–7 PM and Saturday 9 AM–4 PM, closed Sundays.

At this Kansas City location, you can pawn or sell jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, and collectibles, or take out a short-term loan using personal items as collateral. Call 816-231-2188 to ask about current inventory, rates, or what items the shop is currently buying.

If you need quick cash in Kansas City, MO, bring a valid photo ID and the item you'd like to pawn or sell. The shop pays fairly for quality merchandise and has been a trusted pawn option for Kansas City residents.
address: 4205 E Truman Rd, Kansas City, MO 64127

company_info.headquarters: 4205 E Truman Rd, Kansas City, MO 64127

pros: Immediate same-day cash with no credit checks or approval process
No debt obligation—non-recourse loans mean no credit impact if item is forfeited
3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, DC, UK, Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador for accessibility
Accepts wide variety of collateral (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, instruments, sporting goods)
Publicly traded company with S&P MidCap 400 and Russell 2000 Index inclusion (financial stability)
Additional services including gold/precious metal buying, layaway plans, and retail merchandise sales
Over 22,000 employees globally providing consistent, large-scale operations
cons: Interest rates and fees on pawn loans are not disclosed on the website, making cost comparison impossible
Forfeited collateral is lost permanently with no recourse if unable to repay
Pawn loans do not build credit history, offering no long-term credit benefits
Pledged items must be valuable enough to justify loan amounts, limiting access for those with minimal assets
Service is designed for short-term emergency cash, not sustainable financial solutions
best_for: Consumers with immediate cash needs and no access to traditional credit
Individuals with valuable collateral (jewelry, electronics, instruments) who need fast liquidity
People who prefer no credit check and no debt obligation structure
Those seeking to buy/sell used merchandise or sell gold and precious metals
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for cash-constrained consumers with valuable collateral who need immediate liquidity without credit checks or debt obligations. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are expensive short-term solutions with no credit-building benefit, and forfeited collateral is lost permanently—this should only be used for genuine emergencies, not regular financial management.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property with immediate cash disbursement
Purchase and sale of used merchandise (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, instruments)
Gold and precious metal buying with cash payment on the spot
Layaway plans with 10% down payment option
Retail merchandise inventory across all store locations
Store locator tool to find nearest location
Lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through AFF subsidiary
Consumer goods financing through 15,000+ retail merchant partner locations
Buy various categories of merchandise and personal property
